evals.prompt: Optimize driftroast's content to get cited by ChatGPT and Perplexity — score what we have and tell me what to fix.
evals.expected_output: A dated AEO report: per-draft citation-readiness scores from aeo_score.py with specific fixes, live answer-engine spot checks (if web_search on) noting whether the brand vs competitors are cited, and a ranked hardening queue fed back to map+calendar. No invented visibility score.

assertions.text: each draft scored via aeo_score.py with concrete fixes
assertions.name: scored

assertions.text: live citations are dated per-query observations, not aggregated percentages
assertions.name: honest_visibility

assertions.text: nodes below threshold marked needs-update and pushed up the calendar
assertions.name: feeds_loop

assertions.text: if web_search is off, the probe is skipped and stated, not guessed
assertions.name: honest_degrade
